'''lodhadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:upbay|upbay]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:upbay|upbay]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lodhadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhadithi|lodhadithi]] || [[word:lodhadiji|lodhadiji]] || [[word:lodhadishi|lodhadishi]] || [[word:lodhadiki|lodhadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhaduthuthu|lodhaduthuthu]] || [[word:lodhadujuju|lodhadujuju]] || [[word:lodhadushushu|lodhadushushu]] || [[word:lodhadukuku|lodhadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhaduthu|lodhaduthu]] || [[word:lodhaduju|lodhaduju]] || [[word:lodhadushu|lodhadushu]] || [[word:lodhaduku|lodhaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhadufthuf|lodhadufthuf]] || [[word:lodhadufjuf|lodhadufjuf]] || [[word:lodhadufshuf|lodhadufshuf]] || [[word:lodhadufkuf|lodhadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhadethe|lodhadethe]] || [[word:lodhadeje|lodhadeje]] || [[word:lodhadeshe|lodhadeshe]] || [[word:lodhadeke|lodhadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhadothotho|lodhadothotho]] || [[word:lodhadojojo|lodhadojojo]] || [[word:lodhadoshosho|lodhadoshosho]] || [[word:lodhadokoko|lodhadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhadotho|lodhadotho]] || [[word:lodhadojo|lodhadojo]] || [[word:lodhadosho|lodhadosho]] || [[word:lodhadoko|lodhadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhadofthof|lodhadofthof]] || [[word:lodhadofjof|lodhadofjof]] || [[word:lodhadofshof|lodhadofshof]] || [[word:lodhadofkof|lodhadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhadïfthïf|lodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfjïf|lodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfshïf|lodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfkïf|lodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhadïfthïfthïf|lodhadïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfjïfjïf|lodhadïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfshïfshïf|lodhadïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfkïfkïf|lodhadïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhadïfthïf|lodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfjïf|lodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfshïf|lodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfkïf|lodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhadïfthïf|lodhadïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfjïf|lodhadïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfshïf|lodhadïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhadïfkïf|lodhadïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhadæthæ|lodhadæthæ]] || [[word:lodhadæjæ|lodhadæjæ]] || [[word:lodhadæshæ|lodhadæshæ]] || [[word:lodhadækæ|lodhadækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhadathatha|lodhadathatha]] || [[word:lodhadajaja|lodhadajaja]] || [[word:lodhadashasha|lodhadashasha]] || [[word:lodhadakaka|lodhadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhadatha|lodhadatha]] || [[word:lodhadaja|lodhadaja]] || [[word:lodhadasha|lodhadasha]] || [[word:lodhadaka|lodhadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhadafthaf|lodhadafthaf]] || [[word:lodhadafjaf|lodhadafjaf]] || [[word:lodhadafshaf|lodhadafshaf]] || [[word:lodhadafkaf|lodhadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lodhadasha|lodhadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lodhadshësha|lodhadshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lodhadrosha|lodhadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lodhadmusha|lodhadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lodhadyasha|lodhadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golodhadnkshësha|golodhadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golodhadnkrosha|golodhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golodhadnkmusha|golodhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golodhadnkyasha|golodhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lodhadhadasha|lodhadhadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lodhadhadshësha|lodhadhadshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lodhadhadrosha|lodhadhadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lodhadhadmusha|lodhadhadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lodhadhadyasha|lodhadhadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golodhadhadnkshësha|golodhadhadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golodhadhadnkrosha|golodhadhadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golodhadhadnkmusha|golodhadhadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golodhadhadnkyasha|golodhadhadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ledhædasha|ledhædasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ledhædshësha|ledhædshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ledhædrosha|ledhædrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ledhædmusha|ledhædmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ledhædyasha|ledhædyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goledhædnkshësha|goledhædnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goledhædnkrosha|goledhædnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goledhædnkmusha|goledhædnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goledhædnkyasha|goledhædnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lodhfadasha|lodhfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lodhfadshësha|lodhfadshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lodhfadrosha|lodhfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lodhfadmusha|lodhfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lodhfadyasha|lodhfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golodhfadnkshësha|golodhfadnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golodhfadnkrosha|golodhfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golodhfadnkmusha|golodhfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golodhfadnkyasha|golodhfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
